## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress and align on strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Thought Leadership Pivot:** Shifting from a sequential series to standalone articles to enable more flexible publishing. Airbyte will provide 3 existing posts by EOD today to resolve a handoff issue.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [**Founder-Led Topics:** Airbyte founders will provide the next 15 thought leadership topics, removing decision fatigue and ensuring content alignment with their vision.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [**Content OS Review:** Tanmay will review the updated Content OS list today, which now incorporates feedback from John (Airbyte) to refine titles and remove irrelevant topics.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Platform Deep Dive:** A product deep dive will be scheduled for next week to give GrowthX team members the context needed for effective PSEO strategy and to get an MCP launch timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

## Topics

### Thought Leadership Strategy Pivot

  - [**Problem:** A handoff friction point was identified. Airbyte's John had already written 3 posts for the "agent blueprint" series before the GrowthX engagement began.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [**Impact:** This made the planned sequential flow illogical, as a recent "Airbyte viewpoint" post didn't fit the original structure.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [**Solution:** Airbyte will provide the 3 existing posts by EOD today to give GrowthX full context and resolve the handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [**New Direction:** The team will pivot to standalone articles on distinct topics instead of a sequential series.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This allows for more flexible publishing and better aligns with the goal of interviewing founders for their ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [**Founder-Led Topics:** Airbyte founders will provide the next 15 topics, ensuring content aligns with their vision and removing decision fatigue.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)

### Content OS & Blog Production

  - [**Content OS Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Rejected:** 4 topics are now in the "backlog" tab.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Revised:** Titles for other topics were updated based on feedback from John (Airbyte).](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
      - [**Action:** Tanmay will review the full list today to finalize topic selection.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Blog Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [**Review:** The first blog draft was shared for calibration on tone and company context.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [**In Production:** A second blog is in progress, with a draft expected by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Publishing:** GrowthX has direct Webflow access to publish approved articles.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)

### Platform Deep Dive

  - [**Need:** A product deep dive is required to provide the GrowthX team with the context needed for effective strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Objectives:**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [Understand the Airbyte platform's functionality and features.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [Inform PSEO strategy based on product knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [Get a timeline for the Minimum Composable Product (MCP) launch.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Action:** Mario will schedule the deep dive and identify the necessary engineering participants.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Airbyte (Mario/Kushal):**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Share the 3 existing thought leadership posts with GrowthX by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Schedule the product deep dive for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Airbyte (Tanmay):**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Review the updated Content OS list and provide final feedback to Aida today.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Erik):**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
      - [Get founder approval to pivot to standalone thought leadership articles.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Aida):**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [Share the second blog draft by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
